name: Lemon-Basil Swordfish
recipeIngredient: 2 (4 oz) swordfish steaks (about ¾ inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fish on a rack coated with cooking spray; place the rack in a shallow roasting pan.
2. Combine minced garlic, 1½ tablespoons lemon juice, and vegetable oil. Brush half of this mixture onto the fish and sprinkle with ¼ teaspoon basil.
3. Broil 6 inches from heat for 4 minutes, turning the fish over to brush with the remaining mixture and sprinkle with the remaining ¼ teaspoon basil.
4. Broil an additional 3 minutes or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork. Set aside and keep warm.
5. Arrange carrot strips in a vegetable steamer over boiling water. Steam for 3 minutes, add radishes and steam for an additional 2 minutes, then add snow peas and steam for another 30 seconds.
6. Transfer vegetables to a bowl. Add the remaining lemon juice and pepper; toss gently.
7. Serve with fish. Approximately 186 calories per serving of fish and 1 cup of vegetables (fat: 6.4g, cholesterol: 44mg).
